message.content:
Search src/components/ for any existing canvas, deck.gl, timeline, or viewport-related code. Return:
1. List of existing files that relate to canvas/visualization
2. Any existing machine/slice definitions for canvas state
3. How App.tsx currently renders the main view
4. Any existing deck.gl layer implementations

Max 500 tokens with file paths and key findings.

content.text: I'll search the src/components/ directory for visualization-related code, focusing on canvas, deck.gl, timeline, and viewport implementations.
Now let me check the InfiniteCanvas and canvas state definitions:
Now let me check the layer implementations:

Perfect! I have all the information needed. Let me compile the findings. ## Canvas/Visualization Code Search Results ### 1. Existing Visualization Files **Canvas Layer Files:** - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/InfiniteCanvas.tsx` - Main canvas component (1500+ lines) - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/layers/StrategicHeatmapLayer.tsx` - deck.gl heatmap - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/layers/TacticalGanttLayer.tsx` - Konva Gantt chart - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/layers/TacticalWideLayer.tsx` - deck.gl compressed Gantt - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/layers/OperationalDetailLayer.tsx` - Konva detail cards - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/layers/DetailCardOverlay.tsx` - React DOM overlay - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/Minimap.tsx` - Navigation minimap - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/DragConfirmationDialog.tsx` - Drag validation dialog **Supporting Files:** - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/layers/types.ts` - Complete type definitions - `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/components/canvas/utils/` - Keyboard, focus, a11y utilities ### 2. Canvas State Machine Definitions **Canvas Slice** (`/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/src/store/slices/canvas.ts`): - `CanvasSliceState` - Viewport (zoom/pan), layers, selection, interaction state - **Zoom levels:** STRATEGIC (0-4), TACTICAL_WIDE (4-8), TACTICAL (8-12), OPERATIONAL (12-16), DETAIL (16+) - **Layer visibility:** pmBlocks, complianceWindows, manhourOverlay, driftOverlay, baselineShadow - **Selection:** selectedPmIds, selectedTrainIds, isMultiSelect **Canvas Data Slice** (`canvasDataSlice`): - Manages data loading for each zoom level (strategicData, tacticalData, operationalData, detailData) - Separate loading/error states per view - Date ranges auto-initialize based on current date ### 3. App.tsx Rendering Structure **Main layout** (from App.tsx lines 21-94): ```
// Left train list // Main canvas area (flex: 1)
// Right panels (360px fixed)
``` ### 4. Existing deck.gl Layer Implementations **StrategicHeatmapLayer** (lines 1-100): - Uses `ScatterplotLayer` and `TextLayer` from @deck.gl - Renders train × year matrix as colored cells - Color scale: PM density (0-7+ PMs) maps to light-to-dark blue - Transforms API data into HeatmapCell objects with positions **TacticalGanttLayer** (lines 1-100): - Uses `react-konva` (Stage, Layer, Rect, Text, Line) - PM blocks + constraint walls + timeline axis - Drag-and-drop with real-time validation - Layout: header (48px), train labels (120px), rows (40px), day width (24px) **Key Color Mappings** (theme/colors.ts imported): - PM_STATUS_COLORS: scheduled, inProgress, completed, cancelled, deferred - CONSTRAINT_COLORS: compliance window boundaries - FLEET_COLORS: KS (sky), ALSTOM (violet), DEFAULT (slate) All visualization code is fully integrated with state management via belt/tools slices, with proper typing and data loading pipelines.
